notes: Scrap, Vantrel, and NOVA now answer complete questions addressed to their own name.
Name-only wake calls get an immediate in-character response and a 15-second natural follow-up window.
NOVA's adult roaster personality is now available in Live Mode with protected-trait safety boundaries intact.
A visible CHECK UPDATE button makes signed private alpha updates available on demand.
New installs use clean audio-device and volume defaults; existing settings and memories remain preserved.
